description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer with a modern, streamlined design, featuring a teal and gray color scheme. The main body is robust and slightly curved, supporting a large metallic mixing bowl that sits securely in a recessed base. The top section houses the motor and likely contains internal gears, with a visible circular button or dial on the side for operation. The bowl is detachable and has two side handles for easy removal and handling. The base is wide and flat, providing stability during use, and the overall construction suggests a combination of plastic and metal materials. The mixer is compact, suitable for kitchen or bakery environments, and designed for efficient mixing of ingredients.
description: A modern teal and gray electric countertop mixer with a large metallic bowl and a sturdy, curved body. Features a side control dial and detachable bowl with handles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the mixer, including the large metallic bowl, curved teal body, and side control dial.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the mixer, with the teal chassis and the bowl's handles barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mixer’s profile from the other side, with the bowl and body shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the bowl facing forward, both handles visible, and the control panel area on the right side.
attribute_control_panel_type: single analog dial/button on the side
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a curved, streamlined form and integrated base
